name: Banana-Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly coat the inside of muffin-pan cups with nonstick cookware spray.
3. Whisk together all-purpose flour, whole-wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg in a bowl.
4. Toss blueberries with 2 teaspoons of the flour mixture; set aside.
5. Beat butter in a large bowl on moderate speed for 4 minutes. Add sugar, increase to moderately high speed and beat for 2 minutes.
6. Beat in egg and vanilla extract; then mashed bananas (mixture will look slightly curdled). Mix in half the flour mixture, buttermilk, then remaining flour mixture.
7. By hand, fold in blueberries.
8. Divide batter among muffin cups. Bake in preheated oven for about 20 minutes, or until puffy and a wooden pick inserted in center withdraws clean.
9. Let muffins stand on cooling rack for 4 to 5 minutes; carefully remove to another rack.
